primary_metric: Every write-time gate has ≥1 try-repo integration test that spawns a real git repo + runs the actual .githooks/pre-commit script + asserts the gate fires/skips per fixture
success_metrics: 100% of write-time gates (currently 16) have at least one try-repo fixture pair (positive: should fire, negative: should pass) at v7.9.1 ship (T1, measured by gate-name set difference)
Try-repo harness runs in CI nightly (or on every PR touching .githooks/* or scripts/check-*.py) and completes in <60s wall-clock (T1, measured via GHA workflow_run timing)
Catches at least 1 regression in the next 90 days that monkey-patch dispatch tests would have missed — measured via a deliberately-introduced regression test during Phase 5 (T1)
Zero false positives during 14-day advisory-mode soak window (T1, measured via gate-coverage.jsonl)
kill_criteria: Harness wall-clock >5 min when scaled to all 16 gates — operators will start skipping it locally; needs sharding or rewrite
False-positive rate >5% during calibration — fixtures don't survive real-world pre-commit state (e.g., HOME-pollution issues, gitignored-file edge cases)
Maintenance burden too high — adding a fixture per new gate becomes a barrier to adding gates (signal: >2h per new fixture pair, or operators reject the discipline)
dispatch_pattern: agent-driven (harness scaffold + fixture generation per gate + CI workflow)
scope_summary: Spawn throwaway git repos in `pytest` fixtures, stage canonical positive/negative fixtures from `tests/fixtures/<gate-id>/`, run the real `.githooks/pre-commit` via subprocess, assert each gate fires or skips per fixture. CI nightly runs the full matrix. Complements F14's monkey-patch dispatch tests (which test main() in isolation) by adding the full pre-commit pipeline integration surface — catches hook composition bugs, regex-match edge cases on real git status output, and HOME-pollution issues that monkey-patches mask. Ships in advisory mode at v7.9.1; advisory→enforced at v7.10 promotion window after 14d Mechanism A calibration. Out of scope: cycle-time check coverage (separate F-candidate), test of `make integrity-check` end-to-end (separate work), Bash-only fixtures (Python pytest-based).

research.notes: Research artifact at research.md. Outstanding questions: Q1 (subprocess vs in-process for the hook invocation), Q2 (fixture format — canonical state.json vs partial-record YAML), Q3 (CI matrix shape — per-gate job vs single job with parametrize), Q4 (worktree cleanup discipline), Q5 (gate-coverage.jsonl pollution prevention — surfaced during research).

prd.notes: PRD at prd.md. Q1-Q5 all LOCKED with recommendations: subprocess invocation, hybrid fixture format (YAML for state.json + canonical .md for content), single CI job + parametrize + JUnit XML, pytest tmp_path auto-cleanup, GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER env-var override. Frozen constants: THROWAWAY_REPO_INIT_FILES, PRE_COMMIT_TIMEOUT_S=30, FIXTURE_DIR=tests/fixtures, GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER_ENV. 8 acceptance criteria + 3 kill criteria. Rollback = single-line CI workflow revert.

tasks.notes: Tasks at tasks.md. 16 write-time gates enumerated + bucketed into 4 fixture groups (schema 5 / closure 4 / telemetry 4 / isolation 3). 12-commit breakdown across T2-T10 + advisory→enforced calendar T11. ~1,720 lines new code/docs total. Deliberate-regression test (T7) design locked: monkey-patch CU_V2_INVALID's check function to silently return True; F14 dispatch test still passes (asserts row emission only); F16 try-repo test catches (asserts pre-commit exit code on integration surface). Per-fixture pattern + per-test parametrize pattern + canonical-ledger-untouched assertion (Q5 test) all spelled out as code in tasks.md.

implementation.notes: T2 shipped (baseline + builder, 12/12 tests pass in 0.08s). T3-T10 remaining for ~2.3d wall-clock total.

calendar_gate.phase_e_unblocker: Phase E exit 2026-06-04 unblocked v7.9.1 build window. F16 is the highest-leverage v7.9.1 candidate per external research synthesis (infra-master-plan §3.4 Theme G note 'Highest-leverage single change'). RICE 48.0; ranked alongside F14 which already shipped without F16 via the monkey-patch pattern (PR #317).
calendar_gate.rationale: Cannot start before v7.9 promotion + Phase E exit because the harness exercises the .githooks/pre-commit script end-to-end, which would have generated test-mode gate-coverage telemetry rows during the Phase E calibration window — contaminating the 14-day baseline used to verify the 3 advisory→enforced promotions.

tasks.description: Decide Q1-Q5 in Phase 0/1 + write PRD + Tasks
Fixture dir layout + tests/fixtures/_baseline/state.json canonical + make_state_json builder

scripts/tests/test_try_repo_harness.py skeleton + make_throwaway_repo() + run_precommit() helpers. Q5 mechanism REVISED during dev — production gates use GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER as module-level constant (not env var); revised opt-out is GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER_DISABLED=1. PRD §3.5 updated. 17/17 tests pass in 2.55s.

Schema gate fixtures (5): SCHEMA_DRIFT_LEGACY_PHASE/_CREATED, FRAMEWORK_VERSION_FORMAT, STATE_OWNER_MISSING/_INVALID. FIXTURES + tests SHIPPED 2026-06-04 but BLOCKED on Q6 finding: production gates hardcode REPO_ROOT to where the .py file lives; subprocess-invoked harness cannot redirect it. Tests marked pytest.mark.skip with reason. Auto-enable when fix-tier REPO_ROOT_OVERRIDE env var ships.
tasks.blocked_by: Q6 — REPO_ROOT_OVERRIDE env var (fix-tier follow-up PR)

Extend .github/workflows/ci.yml with try-repo job (parametrize + JUnit XML; <60s wall-clock)
Deliberate-regression test — monkey-patch CU_V2_INVALID's check function to silently return success; assert F14 dispatch test still passes; assert F16 try-repo catches
Update CLAUDE.md Data Integrity Framework section — try-repo discipline + new-gate fixture rule
